title: Extensions to C++ for Transactional Memory Version 2

applicable_answered.question: Q1
applicable_answered.question_text: Does the paper show code of the feature it is proposing?

references.quote: [ Example 1 : unsigned int f() { static unsigned int i = 0; atomic do { ++i; return i; } } Each invocation of f (even when called from several threads simultaneously) retrieves a unique value (ignoring wrap-around). -end example ]
